HGSS.609.0001:
Stop dancing such a serious dance!
Show me something like a hula dance!\f
HGSS.609.0002:
...You mustn’t push such a request
on me.\f
HGSS.609.0003:
Huh?
Are you telling me you don’t respect\r
what the customer wants?\f
HGSS.609.0004:
Well, then I’ll show you how to dance.\f
I’ll show you a great one.
Wahahaha!\f
HGSS.609.0005:
Huh? Who are you?\f
You dare to get in my way?\f
HGSS.609.0006:
Oh, no!
You make me look like a villain!\f
HGSS.609.0007:
Oops!
I have an important mission.\f
If they find out I was wasting time
here, they’ll make me start over\r
as the lowest Team Rocket Grunt!\f
I better leave now!\f
HGSS.609.0009:
You must be [0103,0000,0000], correct?
That was indeed excellent.\r
Kind and strong...\r
Good at raising Pokémon as well...\f
That person does know what to look for
in people...\f
Ohoho! That was just me talking to
myself.\r
Never mind.
HGSS.609.0010:
For Kimono Girls like me, dancing
is everything.\f
I have never gone a day without
a dance practice.\f
Pokémon are the same.\f
They grow with you little by little
each day.
HGSS.609.0011:
Welcome.
My name is Zuki.\r
I met you previously in Violet City.\f
In order to bring back HO-OH, we
needed someone with the right bond\r
with Pokémon.\f
We asked Mr. Pokémon to give this
Mystery Egg to whoever showed\r
true potential.\f
The Egg was eventually handed from
Mr. Pokémon to Professor Elm, and then\r
to you.\f
However, being pure alone will not be
sufficient to face the power of\r
this Pokémon.\r
I must test you.\f
Are you ready? [0200,0000]
HGSS.609.0012:
Welcome.
My name is Zuki.\r
I met you previously in Violet City.\f
In order to bring back LUGIA, we
needed someone with the right bond\r
with Pokémon.\f
We asked Mr. Pokémon to give this
Mystery Egg to whoever showed\r
true potential.\f
The Egg was eventually handed from
Mr. Pokémon to Professor Elm, and then\r
to you.\f
However, being pure alone will not be
sufficient to face the power of\r
this Pokémon.\r
I must test you.\f
Are you ready? [0200,0000]
HGSS.609.0013:
I will test you to see if you are a good
Pokémon Trainer.\f
Are you ready? [0200,0000]
HGSS.609.0014:
That is fine...
I will wait for you to get ready.
HGSS.609.0015:
You are quite strong.\f
You helped me in the Ilex Forest.\f
My name is Naoko. I’m the one that’s
not so good at directions.\f
My eyes witnessed you defeating
Team Rocket when Kurt was in trouble\r
at the SLOWPOKE Well.\f
Allow me to challenge you and your
Pokémon!\f
HGSS.609.0016:
You are quite the Trainer.\f
I remember you chasing off
that Team Rocket Grunt\r
from right here.\f
I must thank you for that.\f
Although, I am actually a Trainer
myself.\f
She who knows the most speaks
the least!\r
I am Miki--the Kimono Girl!\f
Allow me to challenge you and your
Pokémon!\f
HGSS.609.0017:
Excellent fighting spirit!\f
You got me off the ice by pushing me
from the back.\f
I am the one who skates in sandals.\r
I am Sayo--the Kimono Girl!\f
I was listening in the Dragon’s Den
when you passed the test of the Elder.\f
Allow me to challenge you and your
Pokémon!\f
HGSS.609.0018:
I am the last one.\f
You were so dependable at the
Goldenrod Tunnel. I am the one who\r
twirls even underground.\f
I am Kuni--the Kimono Girl!\f
I looked at you in wonder when you
thwarted Team Rocket’s mission\r
to take over the Radio Tower.\r
You must show your strength to me now.\f
Allow me to challenge you and your
Pokémon!\f
HGSS.609.0019:
Talk to Zuki in the middle
when you are ready.
HGSS.609.0020:
We were not wrong about you.
You are indeed worthy of this...\f
Please take it.\f
HGSS.609.0021:
Big sisters!\f
I just saw the big shadow of a Pokémon
over the Bell Tower!\f
It could be...\f
HGSS.609.0022:
Big sisters!\f
I just saw the big shadow of a Pokémon
in the Whirl Islands’ waters!\f
It could be...\f
HGSS.609.0023:
Zuki: [0103,0000,0000]!
We’ll be at the Bell Tower.\r
See you there!\f
HGSS.609.0024:
Zuki: [0103,0000,0000]!
We’ll be at the Whirl Islands.\r
See you there!\f
HGSS.609.0025:
What’s the deal with that Team Rocket
Grunt, messing with my Kimono Girl?\f
You are a Trainer, aren’t you?\r
Please help her!
HGSS.609.0026:
Wonderful!
You were so courageous for your age!\f
It was a rare sight to see!
I want you to have this.\r
Don’t be shy--take it!\f
HGSS.609.0028:
That’s Surf.
It’s a move that lets Pokémon swim\r
across water with ease.\f
HGSS.609.0029:
Not only are the Kimono Girls great
dancers, they’re also skilled at\r
Pokémon.\f
But they battle only for good reasons.\f
I don’t know if you could defeat them if
they showed what they can do...
HGSS.609.0031:
That man’s always with his PSYDUCK.\f
Says he wants a Pokémon that can
Surf and dance.\f
Is he trying to make a Pokémon
that stars at synchronized swimming?
HGSS.609.0032:
Oh... Ouch...!\f
This stomachache!\f
I wouldn’t let this guy act like that
were it not for this pain...!
HGSS.609.0033:
I was supposed to be the hero...!\f
So much for getting close to
a Kimono Girl!
HGSS.609.0034:
Oh... Ouch...!\f
This back pain!\f
I wouldn’t let this guy act like that
were it not for this pain...!
HGSS.609.0035:
Oh... Ouch...!\f
This toothache!\f
I wouldn’t let this guy act like that
were it not for this pain...!
HGSS.609.0036:
The Kimono Girls are so beautiful...\f
But they have to go through rigorous
training.\f
And they have to learn to follow
customs before appearing in public.\f
But if you love something, anything
is possible.
HGSS.609.0037:
To do such a terrible thing to
a Kimono Girl!\f
I don’t understand how young people
behave these days.
HGSS.609.0038: Quite the Trainer for your age indeed!
HGSS.609.0039:
This desk is used for
certain programs...
HGSS.609.0040: Thank you for your help the other day.
HGSS.609.0042:
Thank you for your help the other day.\f
You have beautifully proven that the
bond between people can be extended to\r
the bond between people and Pokémon...\f
We all appreciate that you have lived up
to our expectations, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
If you feel that this experience has
taught you anything, the people you\r
should thank are not us, but\r
Mr. Pokémon and Professor Elm...
HGSS.609.0044: Thank you for your help the other day.
HGSS.609.0045:
I will test how closely you’ve
bonded with your Pokémon!\f
